calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Shawna Van Tree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kenneth R. Wachtel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Center Bank,

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Monica Kyungsook Cho aka Monica K. Cho individually and dba Sorrento Deli,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 30 dismissed.
Witness: Peter Shin Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $118,912.52
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 5.750%: $14,574.11
Attorney's Fees: $12,936.00
Costs: $2,800.85
Late fees: $580.05
Total Judgment in the amount of $149,803.53
Judgment signed in open court.
